latestArticles.description: Back-to-back courtroom losses have put technology giants, including Meta and Google, in uncertain territory as they face lawsuits and bans on teen users.

latestArticles.title: Battle Over a Contentious Police Unit Re-emerges in New York City
latestArticles.description: A bill will be introduced on Thursday to restrict the Police Department’s Strategic Response Group from being deployed at protests.

latestArticles.title: Number of immigrants in border communities plunges thanks to Trump crackdown
latestArticles.description: U.S. city growth slowed in 2025, with border towns like Laredo and Yuma affected most as immigration dropped under President Donald Trump, Census data shows.
